columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: Event timestamp, mapped from the ts field indicating when Scutum detected or blocked the communication.

columns.name: IpAddress
columns.description: Source IP address of the request.

columns.name: Block
columns.description: Whether the communication was blocked. False when WAF defense is OFF or for false positive traffic.

columns.name: Category
columns.description: Array of detected attack categories. A single request may trigger multiple attack classifications.

columns.name: Request
columns.description: Base64-encoded HTTP request data from the defense log. May not be present if no record exists.

columns.name: Response
columns.description: Base64-encoded HTTP response data from the defense log. May not be present if no record exists.
